# mtncloud_task (Data Source)

Looks up an MTN Cloud automation task by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mtncloud_task" "deploy" {
  name = "deploy-app"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the task to look up.

### Read-Only

- `code` (String) User-defined code/identifier.
- `execute_target` (String) Where the task runs.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the task.
- `type` (String) Friendly task type (shell, python, …).
